title: alyssum alpestre var. suffrutescens
intro: Alyssum alpestre var. suffrutescens, also known as dwarf white alyssum, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a low-growing, shrub-like herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which provide various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. Alyssum alpestre var. suffrutescens can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
